# Drive content-edit fixture

This is a real `.md` file used by the capability probe
(`scripts/probe-drive-content-edit.mjs`) to prove that the Google Drive API
`files.update` media path can rewrite the *content* of a non-native file —
the exact thing the `workspace-mcp` `update_drive_file` tool refuses.
